metadata.title: AICA 20+5 Assurance Profile
metadata.remarks: Selects 20 NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 controls and five project-specific AI controls for an internal readiness simulation.

props.name: profile-note
props.value: Public endpoints are risk-accepted for the student-cost profile when authenticated, rate-limited, and monitored.

props.name: profile-note
props.value: Versioning, soft delete, lifecycle retention, and tested restore are required; locked WORM is excluded.
